user_query: How did John overcome a mistake he made during a big game in basketball?

node_data.text: John had a basketball game where his team was trailing significantly in the 4th quarter, but they dug deep to overturn the deficit and win the game.

selected_nodes.reasoning: Describes how John and his team overcame a significant deficit in a basketball game, which relates to overcoming a mistake.

node_data.text: John hit a buzzer-beater shot to win a game when they were down 10 in the 4th quarter, which was one of their favorite thrilling sports moments.

selected_nodes.reasoning: Mentions a specific moment where John hit a buzzer-beater shot to win a game, showcasing a pivotal moment of overcoming adversity in a game.
